attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE1, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE15, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE2, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.BILL_OF_LADING, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.COMMENTS, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.CREATED_BY, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.CREATION_DATE, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.EMPLOYEE_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.EXPECTED_RECEIPT_DATE, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.GES_UPDATE_DATE, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.GLOBAL_NAME, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.NUM_OF_CONTAINERS, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ORGANIZATION_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.PACKING_SLIP, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.RECEIPT_NUM, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.RECEIPT_SOURCE_CODE, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.SHIPMENT_NUM, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.SHIPPED_DATE, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.VENDOR_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.VENDOR_SITE_ID, MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.WAYBILL_AIRBILL_NUM 
FROM
 MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS 
WHERE
 MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.GES_UPDATE_DATE>to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
